overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, riding through Night City on wet neon-lit streets at night. The player navigates highways, tunnels, and elevated roads with futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distance, featuring high-speed driving and urban exploration.

events.description: accelerating on wet highway approaching tunnel entrance
entering covered highway tunnel from open road

agents.ego_description: riding motorcycle at high speed on wet neon-lit highway, approaching tunnel entrance with distant skyscrapers visible

entered.detail: large red illuminated advertisement billboard visible against night sky
overhead highway gantry with signage marking district entrance
rain-slicked multi-lane road surface reflecting neon lights
futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows visible in the distance
tropical trees lining the highway median

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet multi-lane highway at night, with the motorcycle accelerating toward a tunnel entrance. Neon billboards and distant skyscrapers illuminate the hazy atmosphere, while palm trees line the road. The player approaches and enters a covered highway tunnel.

events.description: transition from neon-lit exterior to artificially lit tunnel interior
exiting tunnel to surface intersection with city streets

agents.ego_description: navigating through curved tunnel with distinctive blue concrete walls, slowing for exit to surface streets

entered.detail: smooth blue-painted concrete walls lining the tunnel interior
fluorescent light fixtures mounted on tunnel ceiling
illuminated vertical advertisement screens on tunnel walls

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle travels through an enclosed highway tunnel with distinctive blue concrete walls and overhead fluorescent lighting. Digital advertising banners line the walls. The player navigates a gentle curve before exiting back to the surface at an urban intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban surface streets with graffiti and residential buildings

events.description: making sharp right turn at intersection onto narrower street
road surface shows colorful graffiti and painted markings

agents.ego_description: navigating through city surface streets, executing turns around corners and observing graffiti-covered road surfaces in residential-industrial mixed area

entered.detail: surface street crossing with traffic control signals
pedestrian crossing markings on road surface
low-rise urban residential buildings with lit windows
colorful painted markings and street art covering asphalt
metal fencing surrounding industrial lots

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the motorcycle navigates urban surface streets with crosswalks and residential buildings. The player makes sharp turns through intersections, passing parked vehicles and observing colorful graffiti art painted on the wet road surface. Chain-link fences and utility poles line the industrial-residential mixed streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial underpass tunnel with concrete walls

events.description: entering second tunnel beneath highway overpass
overtaking large commercial truck on the right side within tunnel

agents.ego_description: entering industrial tunnel and maneuvering past slow-moving commercial truck vehicle ahead

notable_agents.action: large commercial truck driving slowly ahead in tunnel, passed on the right side

entered.detail: concrete tunnel portal beneath highway overpass with height markings
raw concrete walls with graffiti and utility fixtures
illuminated traffic sign indicating speed restriction
bright light visible at tunnel end indicating exit

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle enters a second industrial tunnel beneath an overpass, with concrete walls and artificial lighting. The player overtakes a slow-moving commercial truck on the right side while navigating toward the tunnel exit visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with panoramic city center views

events.description: exiting tunnel to elevated highway ramp with city skyline view
accelerating on elevated highway toward neon-lit city center towers

agents.ego_description: riding on elevated highway with clear view of distant neon skyscrapers, maintaining high speed on wet road surface

entered.detail: concrete and metal safety barriers along elevated roadway edges
twin futuristic towers with prominent vertical neon lighting marking city center
elevated roadway structure crossing above the current path
large illuminated advertisements on buildings in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens on an elevated highway ramp with panoramic views of Night City's center. The motorcycle accelerates along the wet road, passing under overpasses while the distinctive twin neon skyscrapers dominate the horizon. Highway guardrails line the elevated roadway as the player drives toward the illuminated city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed journey from a hazy neon highway through a series of urban tunnels and surface streets, ultimately ascending toward the illuminated city center. It begins with a motorcycle accelerating along a wet multi-lane highway lined with palm trees, moving steadily toward the mouth of a covered tunnel. As the camera enters the enclosure, the environment shifts to blue concrete walls and fluorescent lighting before exiting back to the surface to navigate sharp turns through residential intersections marked by colorful graffiti and chain-link fences. The scene then dips back into a second industrial tunnel beneath an overpass, where the rider overtakes a commercial truck before emerging onto an elevated highway ramp. Finally, the perspective opens up to a panoramic view of the horizon, accelerating past guardrails toward the towering twin neon skyscrapers of the city center.
